description: This figure presents the pseudo-binary equilibrium phase diagram of the Fe-7.95Mn-0.25C-4.94Al (wt.%) low-density medium manganese steel system, calculated via Thermo-Calc software with the TCFE9 database. The x-axis denotes the weight percent of Al ranging from 0 to 10 wt.%, while the y-axis represents temperature from 500 to 1600 °C. Multiple phase regions are labeled, including liquid phase (L), γ+L, α+L, single austenite (γ), γ+α, γ+θ, γ+α+κ, and α+κ, illustrating phase stability variations with Al content and temperature. A red star marked "Current Study" is plotted at ~4.94 wt.% Al and 850 °C, corresponding to the intercritical annealing condition adopted in this work, which locates in the γ+α two-phase region, verifying that the annealing process can produce the target dual-phase microstructure of austenite and ferrite as designed. The phase diagram also confirms that Al addition promotes ferrite formation in the studied alloy system.
